dct_description_sm: excudebat Antwerpiæ Gerardus de Iode, novomagensis ; Ioannes à Duetecū, Lucas, à Duetecum fecerunt.
3 bar scales on map, given in "Milliaria Gelriæ minora," "Mediocria milliaria," and "Milliaria magna."
North oriented toward right of sheet.
From de Jode's Speculum Orbis Terrarum, Part II, Plate XXXI, Antwerp, 1578.
